title: Research elevates Arctic Indigenous voices to understand climate change
summary: An umiaq (boat) sits at the slushy ice edge of the Arctic Ocean near Point Hope, Alaska. A recent paper describes a long-running partnership between scientists and Indigenous Alaskans that taps into Indigenous knowledge to respond to the changing Arctic. Photo by Guy Omnik. Indigenous Alaskans have shared nearly 10,000 observations about the rapidly changing Arctic during the past decade in a partnership with university scientists presented in a recent paper. The paper, published in the journal Arctic Science, outlines results and lessons fro...

title: Is your voter information current for the October 3, 2023 Regular Municipal Election?
summary: CBJ Elections are now conducted as By Mail Elections. That means that all CBJ registered voters in active status with the State of Alaska Division of Elections, as of September 3, 2023 will be mailed a ballot for the October 3, 2023 Regular Municipal Election. title: Capital Credits
summary: Each year that AVEC earns a margin (revenue collected that is not needed to cover the cost of providing service), it is assigned to members in proportion to the amount they were billed for electricity during that year.
